untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom requires multi-bar pattern analysis: (1) identification of two distinct valley lows separated by a peak over a specific timeframe (weeks apart), (2) precise measurement of bottom-to-bottom variation (2-5%), (3) valley-to-peak rise measurement (10%+), and (4) prior downtrend validation. These require lookback windows and comparative logic across multiple bars that cannot be fully expressed in single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern detection would require custom multi-bar logic or a dedicated pattern recognition function.
